results.rendered_html:
1. bhautika (wie eben) adj. f. ī
1〉 die Wesen betreffend, ihnen geltend: bali  M. 3,74 . sarga die Schöpfung der Wesen  SĀṂKHYAK. 53 .
— 2〉 aus den Elementen gebildet, dieselben betreffend, materiell: vṛkṣāṇāṃ nāsti bhautikam an den Bäumen ist nichts Materielles  MBH. 12,6829 . 9982 . sarga 11562 .  HARIV. 7801 . indriyāṇi  SUŚR. 1,312,6 . prakṛtimiha narāṇāṃ bhautikīṃ kecidāhuḥ 334,18 .  KAP. 2,20 .  RAGH. 2,57 .  BHĀG. P. 1,4,17 . 3,20,14 . 22,37 . 26,42 . 5,14,34 . 7,2,42 .  MĀRK. P. 43,76 .  LIṄGA-P. _bei_ MUIR, ST. 4,326,4 .  COLEBR. Misc. Ess. I, 392. fg.  Vgl. cāturbhautika, pāñca˚.

results.rendered_html:
bhautika a. (kī f.) [bhūt-ṭhak]
1 Belonging to created or living beings;  Ms. 3. 74. 
2 Formed of coarse elements, elemental, material; piṃḍeṣvanāsthā khalu bhautikeṣu  R. 2. 57. 
3 Relating to evil spirits.
4 Possessed by evil spirits.
— kaḥ N. of Śiva.
— kaṃ
1 A pearl.
2 Anything elemental.
Comp.
— maṭhaḥ a monastery.
— vidyā sorcery, witch-craft.
